Name: MAP_AREA_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the parameters that relate to map areas.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Network Test Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the NT version or mark the ones to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Disable Param: Release Version
Fields.Description: Exclude from the product version or mark the items to be excluded.

Fields.Name: Environmental Map: Morning
Fields.Description: If the environmental map photography used for the morning time.

Fields.Name: Environmental Map: Day (A)
Fields.Description: If the environmental map photography used for the day time.

Fields.Name: Environmental Map: Day (B)
Fields.Description: If the environmental map photography used for the day time.

Fields.Name: Environmental Map: Evening
Fields.Description: If the environmental map photography used for the evening time.

Fields.Name: Environmental Map: Night
Fields.Description: If the environmental map photography used for the night time.

Fields.Name: Environmental Map: Late Night (A)
Fields.Description: If the environmental map photography used for the late night time.

Fields.Name: Environmental Map: Late Night (B)
Fields.Description: If the environmental map photography used for the late night time.

Fields.Name: Skybox ID: Morning
Fields.Description: The skybox dome row ID to use during the morning time.

Fields.Name: Skybox ID: Day (A)
Fields.Description: The skybox dome row ID to use during the day time.

Fields.Name: Skybox ID: Day (B)
Fields.Description: The skybox dome row ID to use during the day time.

Fields.Name: Skybox ID: Evening
Fields.Description: The skybox dome row ID to use during the evening time.

Fields.Name: Skybox ID: Night
Fields.Description: The skybox dome row ID to use during the night time.

Fields.Name: Skybox ID: Late Night (A)
Fields.Description: The skybox dome row ID to use during the late night time.

Fields.Name: Skybox ID: Late Night (B)
Fields.Description: The skybox dome row ID to use during the late night time.
